title: oberonia iridifolia var. denticulata
intro: Oberonia iridifolia var. denticulata, also known as a species of orchid, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Oberonia iridifolia var. denticulata are associated with its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and processing the leaves or roots to create teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use.
